question: What did Asfandiar say to you before he left?
answer:
As Asfandiar told me, I had to go hide right away. He said to go anywhere—not at my dad's house and not at your mom's house. I just had to go hide, otherwise they would kill me. 

First they would capture me and hold me as a hostage until my husband came back. If he didn't come back, they would put me in jail or kill me. They were definitely going to kill me.
